lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪੜੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਉਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har parreeai har bujheeai guramatee naam udhaaraa |
lines.english: Study the Lord's Name, and understand the Lord's Name; follow the Guru's Teachings, and through the Naam, you shall be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪੂਰੀ ਮਤਿ ਹੈ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai pooree mat hai poorai sabad beechaaraa |
lines.english: Perfect are the Teachings of the Perfect Guru; contemplate the Perfect Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲੁ ਬਿਲੋਵੈ ਜਲੁ ਮਥੈ ਤਤੁ ਲੋੜੈ ਅੰਧੁ ਅਗਿਆਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jal bilovai jal mathai tat lorrai andh agiaanaa |
lines.english: The blind ignorant mortal stirs the water and churns the water, wishing to obtain butter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠਸਠਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਾਟਣਹਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: atthasatth teerath har naam hai kilavikh kaattanahaaraa |2|
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage, and the Eradicator of sins. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਦਧਿ ਮਥੀਐ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee dadh matheeai amrit paaeeai naam nidhaanaa |
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, one churns the cream, and the treasure of the Ambrosial Naam is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਪਸੂ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manamukh tat na jaananee pasoo maeh samaanaa |3|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is a beast; he does not know the essence of reality that is contained within himself. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਦੂਜੀ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabade je marai fir marai na doojee vaar |
lines.english: But when he dies in the Word of the Guru's Shabad, then he does not die, ever again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਰੀ ਮਰੁ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa maree mar mar jamai vaaro vaar |
lines.english: Dying in egotism and self-conceit, one dies, and dies again, only to be reincarnated over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਭਿ ਕੁਲ ਉਧਾਰਣਹਾਰ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramatee jagajeevan man vasai sabh kul udhaaranahaar |4|
lines.english: When he follows the Guru's Teachings, and enshrines the Lord, the Life of the World, within his mind, he redeems all his generations. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਵਖਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਸਚਾ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa vakhar naam hai sachaa vaapaaraa |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the true object, the true commodity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਨਿਤ ਤੋਟਾ ਸੈਸਾਰਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae kaar kamaavanee nit tottaa saisaaraa |5|
lines.english: To work in the love of duality, brings constant loss in this world. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa naam sansaar hai guramatee veechaaraa |
lines.english: The Naam is the only true profit in this world. Follow the Guru's Teachings, and contemplate it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਥਾਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੇ ਘਰ ਬਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: saachee sangat thaan sach sache ghar baaraa |
lines.english: True is one's association, true is one's place,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸੰਤੋਖਿਆ ਸਚਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sachee baanee santokhiaa sachaa sabad veechaaraa |6|
lines.english: Contemplating the True Word of the Guru's Bani, and the True Word of the Shabad, one becomes content. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਭਾਉ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa bhojan bhaau sach sach naam adhaaraa |
lines.english: And true is one's hearth and home, when one has the support of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਭੋਗਣ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੀਆ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਸੰਘਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ras bhogan paatisaaheea dukh sukh sanghaaraa |
lines.english: Enjoying princely pleasures, one shall be destroyed in pain and pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਟਾ ਨਾਉ ਧਰਾਈਐ ਗਲਿ ਅਉਗਣ ਭਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: mottaa naau dharaaeeai gal aaugan bhaaraa |
lines.english: Adopting a name of greatness, one strings heavy sins around his neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਤੂ ਧਣੀ ਅਵਿਗਤੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar too dhanee avigat apaaraa |
lines.english: You are inaccessible and unfathomable; O Lord, You are imperishable and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਦਾਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਤੂ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਾਰਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: maanas daat na hovee too daataa saaraa |7|
lines.english: Mankind cannot give gifts; You alone are the Giver of everything. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਦਰੁ ਜੋਈਐ ਮੁਕਤੇ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee dar joeeai mukate bhanddaaraa |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, seeking at the Lord's Door, one finds the treasure of liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲੁ ਨ ਚੂਕਈ ਸਾਚੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak mel na chookee saache vaapaaraa |8|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, this union is not broken, if one deals in the merchandise of Truth. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਲਾਦਿਆ ਦੀਆ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਮੰਝਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bikh bohithaa laadiaa deea samund manjhaar |
lines.english: The boat is loaded with sin and corruption, and launched into the sea.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਧੀ ਦਿਸਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਨਾ ਉਰਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kandhee dis na aavee naa uravaar na paar |
lines.english: The shore cannot be seen on this side, nor on the shore beyond.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੰਝੀ ਹਾਥਿ ਨ ਖੇਵਟੂ ਜਲੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਅਸਰਾਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vanjhee haath na khevattoo jal saagar asaraal |1|
lines.english: There are no oars, nor any boatmen, to cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਜਗੁ ਫਾਥਾ ਮਹਾ ਜਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa jag faathaa mahaa jaal |
lines.english: O Baba, the world is caught in the great noose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ubare sachaa naam samaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they are saved, contemplating the True Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਪਵਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਕੋ ਨਾ ਜਲੁ ਨਾ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tithai pavan na paavako naa jal naa aakaar |
lines.english: There is neither wind nor fire, neither water nor form there.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਲੰਘਾਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satiguroo hai bohithaa sabad langhaavanahaar |
lines.english: The True Guru is the boat; the Word of the Shabad will carry them across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲੰਘੇ ਸੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਏ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh langhe se paar pe sache siau liv laae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs reach the shore beyond, lovingly focusing on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਥੈ ਸਚਾ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਇ ਭਵਜਲ ਤਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tithai sachaa sach naae bhavajal taaranahaar |2|
lines.english: The True Name of the True Lord is there; it carries them across the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aavaa gaun nivaariaa jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: Their comings and goings are ended, and their light merges into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਹਜੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਚੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramatee sehaj aoopajai sache rahai samaae |3|
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, intuitive peace wells up within them, and they remain merged in the True Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਦੀਜੈ ਦੋਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa paaeeai kis no deejai dos |
lines.english: One obtains what is pre-ordained; why does he blame others?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਪੁ ਪਿੜਾਈ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਖੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਰੋਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sap pirraaee paaeeai bikh antar man ros |
lines.english: The snake may be locked in a basket, but it is still poisonous, and the anger within its mind remains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਫਾਥਾ ਫਾਹੀਐ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਛੋਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: duramat faathaa faaheeai fir fir pachhotaae |
lines.english: caught in the trap of evil-mindedness, he regrets and repents, again and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਗਰਮਛੁ ਫਹਾਈਐ ਕੁੰਡੀ ਜਾਲੁ ਵਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maagaramachh fahaaeeai kunddee jaal vataae |
lines.english: The crocodile is caught by the hook and line;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਾਰੜੁ ਜੇ ਸੁਣੇ ਮੰਨੇ ਨਾਉ ਸੰਤੋਸੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh gaararr je sune mane naau santos |4|
lines.english: If one, as Gurmukh, hears and believes in the Name, the charm against poison, his mind becomes content. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਸੁਝਈ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਨ ਮੇਟਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jaman maran na sujhee kirat na mettiaa jaae |5|
lines.english: He does not understand birth and death; the inscription of one's past actions cannot be erased. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਪਾਇ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸੈ ਬਿਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai bikh paae jagat upaaeaa sabad vasai bikh jaae |
lines.english: Injecting the poison of egotism, the world was created; with the Shabad enshrined within, the poison is eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਰਾ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaraa johi na sakee sach rahai liv laae |
lines.english: Old age cannot torment one who remains lovingly absorbed in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jeevan mukat so aakheeai jis vichahu haumai jaae |6|
lines.english: He alone is called Jivan-Mikta, liberated while yet alive, from within whom egotism is eradicated. ||6||
